name: The Overflowing Chalice
explicitMods: 100% increased Charges gained by Other Flasks during Effect
Gains no Charges during Effect of any Overflowing Chalice Flask
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: Empty cup, full of promise.

typeLine: Masochist's Granite Flask of the Pangolin
explicitMods: Gain 2 Charges when you are Hit by an Enemy
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Bubonic Trail
explicitMods: Triggers Level 20 Death Walk when Equipped
56% reduced Duration of Elemental Ailments on You while affected by a Rare Abyss Jewel
29% increased Movement Speed while affected by a Magic Abyss Jewel
24% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills while affected by a Unique Abyss Jewel
flavourText: Even the dead serve the Lightless.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants mana regeneration to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby Allies Regenerate 12.5 Mana per second
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any non-blessing skill with a reservation.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 24% increased Aura effect
Supported Skills Reserve Life instead of Mana
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.name: Ulaman's Gaze
explicitMods:
Projectiles have 4% chance to be able to Chain when colliding with terrain per
Searching Eye Jewel affecting you, up to a maximum of 20%
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an Abyssal Socket on an Item or into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.
flavourText: The Sovereign of the Well seeks dominion over the light.

name: Vaal Caress
explicitMods: +5 to Level of Socketed Vaal Gems
-5 to Level of Socketed Non-Vaal Gems
You gain Onslaught for 20 seconds on using a Vaal Skill
flavourText: "The gems are strangely human at times.
They simply love to be held."
- Doryani, First Seer to the Queen
